reasons: 157.5 visibly points into the screen-left/down quadrant instead of required screen-right/down
135-to-157.5 remains a conspicuous center and pose jump
the generated row does not preserve the original approved rendering closely enough across the fixed row-10 boundary

decision: Neither complete-row repair is packaging eligible. Preserve the original identity-locked look rows and ship only the independently validated running timing refinement.
